note: Hunches seeded from external sources S1 + S2. Each hunch credits % across data / human-source / future-data-collection / luck. Read by scripts/run-daily-debate.ts to route the daily roundtable onto specific positions. Retire by moving to retired_hunches once expires_on passes or catalyst resolves.

sources.name: market heatmap snapshot — 2026-04-16 close
sources.summary: rally day, broad green. leaders: SOUN +12.8, EOSE +11.8, FIG +9.5, HOOD +8.9, USAR +8.4, SNAP +7.8, DASH +7.7, TSLA +7.4, NOW +6.4, PLTR +3.0, META +2.1, NVDA +1.6, GOOG +0.2. laggards: SNDK -6.2, MOD -6.2, EDU -5.3, ASML -5.0, MU -3.8, VRT -2.8, ANET -2.8, BYDDY -1.9, NIO -1.9, TSM -0.7, STZ -1.0. shape: rotation OUT of semis INTO mega-cap app-layer + meme-speculative. semis lagging on broad-green day is the tell.

sources.name: jack sarfati (@jack._.sarfati__) — IG DM, 2026-04-16
sources.summary: SLC trader, mentored by Kent Madsen @ Epic VC. ICT + supply-demand; covered calls + occasional long calls/puts; max 3-week swings; no 0DTE; 2025 +17%. NEAR-TERM: PMI next week; consumer sentiment next Friday; bearish bias going into Monday; holding everything. TACTICAL SHORT-WINDOW for 29x runway: 'look at more leveraged options — Qs, SPY, or even SPUU.' EVENT: plans to SHORT NVDA into 2026-05-20 earnings. STRUCTURAL: 'immense government spending + unpredictable oil = recipe for disaster'; deep recession coming; Warsh @ Fed → money printer → downturn; 'retail getting screwed' — Trump-chatter-driven vol makes standard momentum indicators useless. PERSONAL: taking 1-2 month break from live trading; 'larp at end of the day.' MEETING: ~2026-06-15 in SLC.

catalyst_calendar.event: Saathvik back in SLC — in-person with Jack + buddy

hunches.thesis: NVDA has asymmetric downside into 2026-05-20 earnings. Trim or hedge before the event, don't sit fully exposed.
hunches.action_suggestion: trim NVDA 10% → 7% before 2026-05-15; park proceeds in SGOV; or buy a dated put as defined-risk hedge (cap premium at ~2% of account).

credit_rationale.S1_data_heatmap: semis rolling while mega-cap app-layer leads; NVDA straddles both and underperformed the rip on 2026-04-16 (+1.6% vs TSLA +7.4, DASH +7.7 on a broad-green tape). relative weakness is the signal, not absolute direction.
credit_rationale.S2_human_jack: jack named NVDA earnings directly + plans to short; he's in the tape daily and his 2025 calendar calls have been specific. higher weight than S1 because he's pointing to the exact ticker + date.
credit_rationale.future_data_collection: IV term structure 2026-05-10 onward + analyst revisions 2026-05-12 onward tighten or break this. the hunch should update, not stay static.
credit_rationale.luck: earnings are binary and IV crush cuts both ways. if NVDA beats big, a short or a trim both leave money on the table — irreducible.

hunches.thesis: Pure-play quantum cluster (IONQ+RGTI+QBTS, 20% of book) has correlated ATM-shelf risk and highest beta to any macro red day. Correlation is 0.6, not 0.
hunches.catalyst: any of three files S-3 / 424B5 after a rally; OR first wide-tape red day on recession-confirmation data
hunches.action_suggestion: hard-enforce Flow agent's 0.6 correlation: if any one files ATM, cut the other two 50% same day even without news. No averaging down on dilutive pre-revenue names — panel rule already reflects this; the hunch is to NOT relax it when one is halfway back.

credit_rationale.S1_data_heatmap: heatmap shows meme-speculative leading (SOUN, EOSE, HOOD, FIG); pure-plays trade in that bucket's gravity well. reflexive leadership days often precede ATM announcements — companies raise into strength.
credit_rationale.S2_human_jack: jack's 'deep recession' + 'retail getting screwed' thesis hits these hardest on reversal. his structural read weights this channel.
credit_rationale.future_data_collection: SEC EDGAR monitoring on three tickers (S-3, 424B5, 10-Q cash burn) is a concrete add. The moment that data arrives, the hunch updates.
credit_rationale.luck: single-name headline risk — IONQ/RGTI specifically have been episodic (CEO interviews, government contracts, benchmark claims).

hunches.thesis: Mega-cap AI ex-semis (MSFT, GOOG, IBM) carries the book better than NVDA through 2026-05-20. Shift weight toward IBM and GOOG pre-PMI.
hunches.catalyst: PMI 2026-04-24 + UMich same day; Fed path; recession positioning
hunches.action_suggestion: shift 2-3% from NVDA → IBM before PMI print (2026-04-24). IBM is flow-cleanest + pays dividend + has the most credible FTQ roadmap per historian-agent's existing note.

credit_rationale.S1_data_heatmap: most direct signal — heatmap shows mega-cap app-layer leading while semis roll. highest weight of any channel on this hunch because the observation is present-tense.
credit_rationale.S2_human_jack: his bearish-short-term + 'hold everything + play defense' posture implies mega-cap over semis. directionally consistent but less specific than his NVDA call.
credit_rationale.future_data_collection: PMI actual on 2026-04-24 either confirms or invalidates the rotation setup.
credit_rationale.luck: mega-cap is less single-event-driven than NVDA but still sensitive to Trump/tariff/antitrust headlines — irreducible baseline.

hunches.thesis: SGOV (dry powder) is undersized given jack's bearish 2-week calendar. Add an event-trigger — not only the existing -30% QTUM price trigger.
hunches.action_suggestion: extend portfolio.triggers with: 'deploy_drypowder_on_pmi_miss_below: 48' and 'deploy_drypowder_on_umich_below: 55'. If either print misses, deploy half of SGOV into QTUM within 48h of print. Otherwise hold.

credit_rationale.S1_data_heatmap: no direct heatmap signal for bonds; rally-day context only weakly informs SGOV.
credit_rationale.S2_human_jack: jack named specific macro prints + dates — near-term calendar channel is dominant here. his weight is highest.
credit_rationale.future_data_collection: PMI + UMich prints on 2026-04-24 are the actual resolution — the hunch exists to pre-commit a response to them.
credit_rationale.luck: macro prints rarely random; mostly follow trend. small luck weight appropriate.

hunches.thesis: Defined-risk options sleeve from dry powder — break thematic purity for the 29x runway-to-$100k, hard-capped at $150 total premium at risk.
hunches.catalyst: birthday math requires 29x in 10 weeks; current book is built for survival not 29x. Portfolio + panel will not produce this without an off-thesis sleeve.
hunches.action_suggestion: carve 2-3% (~$70-100) from SGOV for long-dated OTM QQQ or SPY calls, 3-week duration, entered AFTER 2026-05-20 NVDA earnings (post IV crush, post-event clarity), one contract at a time. Tracked as new lottery tier 'F_tactical_options' outside existing buckets. Hard-cap total premium at risk at $150. Any trade breaking the cap is a panel kill-switch event.

credit_rationale.S1_data_heatmap: heatmap doesn't inform options premium — minimal weight.
credit_rationale.S2_human_jack: jack's single highest-conviction actionable advice for a short-window 29x attempt was literally 'look at Qs / SPY / SPUU.' He also caveats 'retail is getting screwed' and is taking a break — so half-weight, not overweight.
credit_rationale.future_data_collection: IV term structure + Trump-tariff headline clock between now and each entry. Lower weight because sleeve is deliberately small.
credit_rationale.luck: options are probabilistic bets by construction. high luck weight is honest, not a flaw — the sleeve IS the luck sleeve. If the birthday math works, this is where it comes from.
